libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0, generated or migrated tests must import and reference jakarta.activation.* classes, not javax.activation.*. The 1.2.1 artifact contains javax.activation classes, while 2.0.0 contains jakarta.activation classes and no javax.activation package.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Copying existing 1.2.1 tests unchanged will keep javax.activation imports and fail javac compilation.
The artifact has no Maven dependencies, so adding another activation implementation dependency would likely mask the intended API-version migration rather than fix setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; the required preparation is to update tests for the Jakarta Activation 2.0 package rename.
